title: FineByte Optimization
description: FineByte is a performance modpack designed for potatoes!
body:
install the modrinth github option, it has more things.

1.21.9 MODRINTH AND SOURCE CODE: https://github.com/Modpacks510/FineByte-Optimization

MRPACK TO ZIP: https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip

1.21.9 AVAILABLE ON CURSEFORGE(not recommended): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/finebyte-optimization

The modpack designed for a potato!

Tests on a potato:

Vanilla: 20 FPS Average

FineByte Optimization: 120 FPS Average

Tests On a Mid PC(Ryzen 5 3600 RTX 3060):

Vanilla: 70 FPS

FineByte Optimization: 530 FPS Average

This modpack includes mods such as Sodium, Indium(Intergrated in sodium for new versions), Lithium and other
Preformance Mods.


The modpack also includes iris shaders.


The main thing this modpack should do is double, maybe even triple your fps!


1.20.x, 1.21.x, 1.19.x, 1.18.x, 1.16.x and 1.12.2 soon, thanks for downloading! i wont make a 1.13, 1.14, 1.15 or 1.17 pack or anything below 1.12.2.
